raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "rhetorical deflection of criticism via relativization of risk and burden-shifting",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "the method (autosuggestion) presents no real danger",
    "every commonly used thing carries some danger",
    "the existence of danger in other things renders the objection irrelevant or moot"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally consistent as rhetoric but logically weak, as it equates disparate risk profiles without evidence",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "audience seeks reassurance against vague fears and accepts that shared presence of risk neutralizes specific concerns",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "specific dangers of autosuggestion exceed those of ordinary items and the comparison discourages proportionate scrutiny"
}
